title: Barbeque's Delight [Forge/NeoForge]
description: Grill skewers in minecraft, with several kinds of seasoning to make them taste better!
body:
This is a mod that expands on the barbecue content in Farmer's Delight by adding a variety of **skewers**, **seasonings**, and blocks for making them!

It's time for a barbecue!

 

This is the forge port of [Barbeque's Delight [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/barbeques-delight)

 

Required dependency: Farmer's Delight

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1dd64bb8486e8b3d90068448bf6d3fe0e3d92a8.png)

## Getting Started
You can view all the recipes for this mod with the help of **JEI**.

- Ingredients basin: Right click to put the **ingredients** into the basin. Hold the side ingredient in your off hand and the **stick** in your main hand, right click ingredient in the basin to craft the skewer. If the skewer requires no side ingredient, hold nothing in your off hand.
- Grill: hold the skewer and right click grill to place the skewer, wait until the smoke is very thick, **sneak** and right click to **flip** the skewer, wait until the skewer is cooked, right click again to take out the skewer!( Tip: If you don't **flip** or don't remove the skewer when it's cooked, you'll get a **burnt skewer**!)
- Seasoning: place grilled skewer on **cutting board**, then right-click the **cutting board** with the seasoning to sprinkle seasoning on the skewer.
- Trading: Trade with **butcher** to get seasonings.
## Seasonings Effect
- Cumin: heal player when eaten
- Pepper: double eating speed
- Chili: hurt the player when eaten, but player can eat it even when the hunger bar is full. 

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0f3d5c4355a453c6e2d3b81821533091d8265d0.png)
